hero.heading: A family workshop. Three mechanics. 20 years.
hero.subtext: Corney's is a family-run workshop in the heart of Taree. Jarrad, Don and Toby are the three people who will actually work on your car. That's the whole operation — and that's the point.

story.heading: Taree's workshop, built on trust and done right.
paragraphs: Don Corney opened the doors in Taree more than 20 years ago. Jarrad grew up in the shop — passing tools, then using them, then running the place. Toby Carter's been on the spanners alongside us for years. Between the three of us we handle everything from logbook servicing on a new hatchback to blue slips on an interstate ute, AC regas to defect clearances, brakes to timing belts.

An honest quote before any work starts. A phone call if anything changes. Your car ready when we said it would be. An invoice that matches the quote. The job done properly the first time — and if it isn't, you bring it back and we fix it.

We hold the full set of licences and authorisations you'd want from a workshop: ARCtick (automotive refrigerant), AUVIS (blue slip inspections), eSafety (pink slips), and authorised defect-clearance repairer. That means we can handle your servicing, your rego checks, your AC work, and your defect clearance all under the one roof.

Most of our work comes from Taree families, tradespeople, fleets and farmers — people who've been coming to us for years and send their kids to us when they get their first car. That's the business. That's what we protect every day. Treat people fairly, do the work properly, and the rest looks after itself.

items.title: Quote first, work second
items.desc: Nothing gets done without a price you've approved. If we find something mid-job, we stop and call you.

items.title: Priced to match the quote
items.desc: The invoice you get is the quote you agreed to. If anything changes along the way, you hear from us before the work happens.

items.title: Ready when we said
items.desc: We tell you when your car will be done, and it's done then. If something delays it, we call before it becomes your problem.
